summary.fail_reason: Demo card click on Fayaz M did not trigger any login API call in this tab — no /api/auth POST fired. Only /api/v1/auth/refresh succeeded (204). Tab 1283664350 stayed on /auth/login after multiple single/double clicks; other worker tabs authenticated successfully with the same demo panel. Tab became unresponsive on final navigate. Cannot confirm whether this is a click-handler regression or a tab-specific race.
